# 4Tango - Tango Event Management Platform

## About
4Tango is a modern platform for tango event organizers to create, manage, and promote their events. Organizers can build custom landing pages, handle registrations, manage payments, and communicate with attendees.

## Platform Features
- Event landing page builder with customizable sections
- Registration form builder
- Payment processing integration
- Email communication system
- Multi-language support (English, Spanish, German, French, Italian, Polish, Turkish)
- Team management with role-based permissions

## Event Discovery
Find tango events by visiting:
- Homepage: https://4tango.com
- Sitemap: https://4tango.com/sitemap.xml

## URL Patterns
- Event pages: https://4tango.com/{lang}/{event-slug}
- Registration: https://4tango.com/{lang}/{event-slug}/register
- Confirmation: https://4tango.com/registration/{access-token}

## Supported Languages
- en: English
- es: Spanish
- de: German
- fr: French
- it: Italian
- pl: Polish
- tr: Turkish

## Contact
For support or inquiries, visit: https://4tango.com/contact
